title: RedBull (By ZbotZero)
description:
Made during Father’s day as a small coding project for my dad.
To quote the ad, "RedBull gives you wings."
body:
The mod is simple, you just have RedBull added to the game.

Crafting Recipe mods are recommended:
- [JEI (Just Enough Items)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei),
- [REI (Roughly Enough Items)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei),

This makes crafting the items easier without having the recipe open in a tab.

If you've seen the RedBull ad you probably already know what this is gonna do XD, have fun!
